message: 有结果了：这条新 idea 现在已经正式收敛成一个最小、可执行的实验包了。结论是继续复用现有 teacher-feature packet bundle，不再重做 bundle 格式；下一步只新增一个不泄漏目标信息的 teacher-anchored adapter 比较，并用它和现有 direct packet control、naive ridge bridge 在同一组 tiny-local 样本上正面对比。这个方向之所以胜出，是因为旧证据已经表明 direct packet 信号虽弱但存在，而 naive bridge 更弱，说明缺口更像“adapter 不够对”而不是“bundle 根本不行”；主要风险是如果 teacher-anchored adapter 仍然失败，那就该升级为更深的 interface redesign，而不是再做局部 loss 调参。下一步我会按这份收敛结果切到 experiment，先把 bounded smoke 的 adapter 定义和执行入口补齐。

guidance_vm.summary: Milestone recorded. Continue from the current anchor and keep the next checkpoint durable.
guidance_vm.why_now: Milestones should mark meaningful progress, not end the route prematurely.
complete_when: The next substantive output is written durably.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.interact(kind='progress', ...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Send the next checkpoint update across active surfaces.
